requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — DNPQ / Project Evidence and Sahara Environment
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——DNPQ / 项目证据及撒哈拉环境
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——DNPQ / 項目證據及撒哈拉環境

summary.en: No public Mauritania EVSE safety regulation naming a mandatory IEC 61851 route was confirmed as of 2026-06-14. In practice, IEC 61851-1 is the appropriate international safety baseline for conductive EV supply equipment, IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations, and IEC 60529 / IEC 62262 evidence should be specified for enclosures exposed to Sahara heat, dust, sand, solar loading, and vandalism risk. DNPQ national standards, donor-funded project specifications, tenders, insurers, site owners, ARE, or SOMELEC may make IEC-family safety evidence a mandatory project acceptance condition.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未确认公开发布的毛里塔尼亚EVSE安全法规明确指定强制IEC 61851路径。在实务中，IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备适用的国际安全基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站；暴露于撒哈拉高温、粉尘、风沙、太阳辐照和人为破坏风险的外壳，应指定IEC 60529 / IEC 62262证据。DNPQ国家标准、捐助方资助项目规格、招标、保险方、场地方、ARE或SOMELEC可能将IEC体系安全证据作为项目验收强制条件。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未確認公開發布的茅利塔尼亞EVSE安全法規明確指定強制IEC 61851路徑。在實務中，IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備適用的國際安全基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站；暴露於撒哈拉高溫、粉塵、風沙、太陽輻照和人為破壞風險的外殼，應指定IEC 60529 / IEC 62262證據。DNPQ國家標準、捐助方資助項目規格、招標、保險方、場地方、ARE或SOMELEC可能將IEC體系安全證據作為項目驗收強制條件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
DNPQ national standards adoption or project specification (verify current status)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which covers conductive charging general requirements in the China domestic system and links to China-specific connector and communication standards. GB/T 18487.1 evidence may be useful as a design reference, but it is not the same as IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 accredited evidence accepted by an IEC-aligned tender, lender, insurer, or Mauritania project reviewer.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，覆盖中国国内体系下传导充电通用要求，并连接中国特有接口和通信标准。GB/T 18487.1证据可作为设计参考，但不等同于IEC体系招标、贷款方、保险方或毛里塔尼亚项目审查方接受的IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23认可证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，覆蓋中國國內體系下傳導充電通用要求，並連接中國特有接口和通訊標準。GB/T 18487.1證據可作為設計參考，但不等同於IEC體系招標、貸款方、保險方或茅利塔尼亞項目審查方接受的IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23認可證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, protective earthing and residual-current protection documentation, isolation monitoring evidence, emergency-stop and interlock tests where applicable, IP and IK certificates, thermal derating curves for high ambient temperatures, dust/sand ingress maintenance procedures, corrosion and UV-resistance evidence, and French or bilingual installation instructions if required by the buyer. A GB/T safety report alone should not be treated as sufficient without clause-level comparison and project acceptance.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流站IEC 61851-23证据、保护接地和剩余电流保护文件、绝缘监测证据、适用时的急停和互锁测试、IP和IK证书、高环境温度热降额曲线、粉尘/风沙侵入维护程序、耐腐蚀和抗UV证据，以及买方要求时的法文或双语安装说明。未完成逐条比较和项目接受时，不应将单独的GB/T安全报告视为充分依据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流站IEC 61851-23證據、保護接地和剩餘電流保護文件、絕緣監測證據、適用時的急停和互鎖測試、IP和IK證書、高環境溫度熱降額曲線、粉塵/風沙侵入維護程序、耐腐蝕和抗UV證據，以及買方要求時的法文或雙語安裝說明。未完成逐條比較和項目接受時，不應將單獨的GB/T安全報告視為充分依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by DNPQ-adopted standard, donor or tender specification, ARE/SOMELEC project review, insurer, site owner, or qualified electrical engineer; public nationwide EVSE-specific IEC 61851 mandate unconfirmed as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritania-facing EVSE documentation should be built around IEC 61851 safety evidence and harsh-environment derating, even where a public national EVSE rule is not confirmed. GB/T 18487 is only a starting point unless the project reviewer accepts a documented clause-by-clause bridge.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向毛里塔尼亚的EVSE文件应围绕IEC 61851安全证据和恶劣环境降额建立，即使尚未确认公开国家EVSE规则。除非项目审查方接受逐条桥接文件，否则GB/T 18487仅是起点。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向茅利塔尼亞的EVSE文件應圍繞IEC 61851安全證據和惡劣環境降額建立，即使尚未確認公開國家EVSE規則。除非項目審查方接受逐條橋接文件，否則GB/T 18487僅是起點。
